flags.title: LTH Capitulation Cooling - Early Bottom Signal
flags.description: Long-term holder capitulation cooling faster than expected. Glassnode data shows LTH selling pressure decelerating after 5 months below key cost bases. Historically precedes major market bottoms.
flags.recommendation: Monitor for confirmation over next 7-14 days. Consider scaling in on confirmed reversal above $65K with volume.

flags.title: Price-Sentiment Bullish Divergence
flags.description: BTC price declined only -0.78% but Fear/Greed Index improved from 25 (Extreme Fear) to 27 (Fear). This divergence suggests underlying buying support absorbing selling pressure.
flags.recommendation: Bullish divergence signal. Watch for volume confirmation on next move above $64K.

watch_list.observation: HIMS declining -9.39% vs broader market weakness. Underperforming BTC/ETH significantly. May indicate sector rotation out of biotech/telehealth or company-specific issue.
watch_list.action_if_triggered: Alert research team to investigate HIMS-specific news and sector rotation patterns

watch_list.observation: Funding rates currently neutral. Watch for spike above 0.05% which would indicate overleveraged longs and potential for long squeeze.
watch_list.action_if_triggered: Alert if funding turns highly positive - reduce leverage exposure

watch_list.observation: ETF outflows drying up. Three consecutive days of positive flows would signal institutional demand returning.
watch_list.action_if_triggered: Flag as strong accumulation signal for research team review

report_summary.key_takeaway: Alternative data showing early signs of BTC bottoming. LTH capitulation cooling and ETF outflows drying are historically reliable early signals. Not confirmed yet - wait for price confirmation above $65K with volume.
report_summary.risk_assessment: Medium - early signals present but not confirmed. Market still in Fear territory. Patience warranted.
report_summary.action_required: Monitor for confirmation. Prepare accumulation strategy but do not execute until confirmation signals align.
